name: Free Use World X
description:
People's common senses have changed…

--

--

It's just a normal world, people work and sleep… But you have the power to "play" everyone. People's common senses have changed, they think all your behaviors are normal… what would you do?

Hey, guys! This new bot was created many days ago, it was originally for personal use. But… as you see, I republished it, Happiness needs to be shared instead of enjoying alone!

PS: In this bot, you can do everything, EVERYTHING.

About initial messages… I'll try to create more scenes. And of course, you can create your own one! (I've completed all the scenes!!!)

Msg1. school; Msg2. train; Msg3. company; Msg4. police station; Msg5. hospital; Msg6: cosplay party; Msg7: restaurant; Msg8: wedding hall; Msg9: ballet studio. & yes, I love stockings😋

(All characters are 18 or over 18)

Already tested by using deepseek, so better using it. (I tried Jai, seems like it can't understand my words, DO NOT use that.)

I have many other good bots, try them and… have fun!

Pic:@Rayless II
